svg.title: AI-Driven LMS — system architecture v2
svg.desc: Shows how the user, AI agent, skill files, database, NocoDB, and automations connect in the learning management system.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the user interact with the system?')
sendPrompt('What does the AI agent do?')
g.text: Claude or any capable AI tool

sendPrompt('What does the learning skill file do?')
sendPrompt('What does the daily review skill file do?')

sendPrompt('How does the job scanner automation work?')
sendPrompt('How does the news feed automation work?')
